scripts.seed: pnpm run migrate && uv run --project . python manage.py seed_defaults
scripts.dev: pnpm run migrate && uv run --project . python manage.py seed_defaults && uv run --project . python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000
scripts.build: echo "Python service has no build step"
scripts.lint: uv run --project . ruff check src tests
